items.title: China begins returning Boeing aircraft to US
items.description: A Boeing 737 Max that was getting readied for a Chinese airline has reportedly returned to Seattle due to the ongoing tariff war between China and the U.S.

items.title: 1 Stock to Buy, 1 Stock to Sell This Week: Philip Morris, Boeing
items.description: • Tesla, Alphabet earnings, and more Trump tariff news will be in focus this week.

items.title: Tesla, Alphabet highlight earnings rush as tariff fallout drives markets: What to know this week
items.description: More than 100 S&P 500 companies are set to report earnings as the market looks to find footing as the fallout from President Trump's tariffs has sent stocks into a tailspin.

items.title: Google, Tesla, and IBM earnings lead a make-or-break week for stocks
items.description: Shaken by geopolitical shocks, the S&P 500 was flat last week and the Nasdaq nosed just into the red — but the Dow Jones Industrial Average finished significantly lower, weighed down by a double blow from UnitedHealth (UNH) and Nvidia (NVDA).

items.title: Jet2: Holiday And Airline Buys Do Not Come Stronger Than This
